subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath brought forth from the shells of the ocean of His Most Great Name the pearls of wisdom and utterance and made them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر من اصداف بحر اسمه الاعظم لئالی الحکمه و البیان و جعلها
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
